title: 10 best herbal teas for fibrocystic breast disease
description: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, teas helps with fibrocystic breast disease because of its anti-inflammatory properties and ability to balance hormone levels. The tea's flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones may help reduce cyst formation and alleviate symptoms such as breast tenderness and pain.
